idea: Increase TILE_K from 64 to 128 with STAGES=2: 8 WGMMAs per barrier vs 4 reduces barrier stall frequency by 2x. SMEM: 2*(64*128*2+256*128*2)+64*256*4=2*(16384+65536)+65536=196608+65536=262144<228KB? No 262KB>228KB. Actually: LHS=2*64*128*2=32768, RHS=2*256*128*2=131072, OUT=65536. Total=229376=224KB. Fits!
expected_gain: +15-25 TFLOPS from halved barrier stall rate
